title: Ensure that scheduled vulnerability scan is enabled on all  servers

input_row.title: Ensure that scheduled vulnerability scan is enabled on all  servers
input_row.description: Ensure that scheduled vulnerability scan is enabled on all servers.
input_row.rationale: Be sure that vulnerability scan is performed periodically to discover system vulnerabilities in time.
input_row.audit: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Vulnerabilities. 3. Click Settings. 4. Ensure that all type of vulnerabilities is enabled. 5. Ensure that High and Medium vulnerabilities scan level are enabled.
input_row.remediation: 1. Login to Security Center Console. 2. Select Vulnerabilities. 3. Click Settings. 4. Apply all type of vulnerabilities. 5. Enable High and Medium vulnerabilities scan level.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**APPROACH DECISION:**
- The audit can be fully verified using Alibaba Cloud APIs or CLI commands, as the settings for scheduled vulnerability scans are likely accessible programmatically through Alibaba Cloud Security Center APIs.
- The audit involves checking whether all types of vulnerabilities are enabled and verifying that High and Medium vulnerability scan levels are activated.

**PROGRAM NAME:** ali_security_center_vulnerability_scan_enabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:** 
- Utilize Alibaba Cloud API calls to interact with the Security Center. The relevant API operations to check for scheduled vulnerability scans can include methods such as `GetVulnerabilitySettings` or similar, where available.
- Employ Aliyun CLI commands or Alibaba Cloud CLI commands to retrieve the necessary settings, for example:
    ```
    aliyun securitycenter GetVulnerabilitySettings --RegionId <your-region-id>
    ```
- Specific parameters to validate include:
  - Verification of all types of vulnerabilities being enabled.
  - Checking if High and Medium vulnerabilities scan levels are enabled.
- Clear Pass/Fail criteria:
    - Pass: if all types of vulnerabilities are enabled and both High and Medium scan levels are activated.
    - Fail: if any type of vulnerability is disabled or if either High or Medium scan levels are not enabled. 

This ensures automated compliance checks against the CIS control for vulnerability scanning on all servers in the Alibaba Cloud environment.
